name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_customer_requests
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_customer_requests' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event-Close_Out_Date/Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Acknowledged` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Resolved` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Event-Date_Event_Occured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-ScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived_Text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate_text` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event-Close_Out_Date/Time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Acknowledged` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event-Date/Time_Resolved` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Event-Date_Event_Occured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`SchedulingDetails-ScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'deltautc|modifiedutc|completeddate|createddate|createduser|startpointname|startdistancepast|EventType-DateReceived_Text|CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured_text|CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate_text|CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate_text|CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate_text|CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate_text|CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate_text|Event-Close_Out_Date/Time|Event-Date/Time_Acknowledged|Event-Date/Time_Received|Event-Date/Time_Resolved|Event-Date_Event_Occured|SchedulingDetails-DueDate|SchedulingDetails-EarliestStartDate|SchedulingDetails-ScheduledDate|EventType-DateReceived|CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured|CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate|CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate|CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate|CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate|CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_customer_requests`
